testcase.name: negative max-executions is a usage error()
--target sets the config path()
testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: expected: <targets/c/target.yaml> but was: <targets\c\target.yaml> at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.build(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:151) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertionFailureBuilder.buildAndThrow(AssertionFailureBuilder.java:132) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.failNotEqual(AssertEquals.java:197) at org.junit.jupiter.api.AssertEquals.assertEquals(AssertEquals.java:182) at org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals(Assertions.java:1156) at kotlin.test.junit5.JUnit5Asserter.assertEquals(JUnitSupport.kt:32) at kotlin.test.AssertionsKt__AssertionsKt.assertEquals(Assertions.kt:63) at kotlin.test.AssertionsKt.assertEquals(Unknown Source) at kotlin.test.AssertionsKt__AssertionsKt.assertEquals$default(Assertions.kt:62) at kotlin.test.AssertionsKt.assertEquals$default(Unknown Source) at de.seuhd.ktfuzzer.CliArgsTest.--target sets the config path(CliArgsTest.kt:30) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:565) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1604)

testcase.name: the output directory is parsed()
each mode value parses()
grammar numeric controls validate their ranges()
no arguments yields the default config()
an unknown mode is a usage error()
a positional argument is a usage error()
an unknown flag is a usage error()
negative lengths and an inverted range are usage errors()
max-executions of zero means unbounded()
help is recognized in both forms()
non-numeric values for numeric flags are usage errors()
a non-positive run timeout is a usage error()
a negative time limit is a usage error()
a flag missing its value is a usage error()
numeric flags are parsed()
length flags are parsed()
grammar recursion strategy parses()
boolean flags are parsed()
